text:
You are part of team "wins-13578-pr-review". Your name is "pipeline-checker".

TASK: Verify the pipeline branch feature/WINS-13578_build-nl-spas exists in the pipelines repo.

Steps:
1. First, find the pipelines repo. Check these locations:
   - /home/yspies/projects/frontend/pipelines
   - ../pipelines relative to /home/yspies/projects/frontend/websites
   - Use `find /home/yspies/projects/frontend -maxdepth 2 -name ".git" -type d` to locate repos
2. Once found, run `git -C <path> branch -a | grep WINS-13578` to find the branch
3. If the branch exists, check what changes are in it: `git -C <path> log main..feature/WINS-13578_build-nl-spas --oneline` or similar
4. Show the diff of the build script changes if possible

Report back with:
- Whether the branch exists
- What changes it contains
- Whether it looks ready

After completing your research, update task #2 as completed using TaskUpdate, and send a message to "team-lead" with your findings.

{"type":"permission_response","request_id":"perm-1770898513791-t8vf772","subtype":"success","response":{"updated_input":{"command":"find /home/yspies/projects/frontend -maxdepth 2 -name \".git\" -type d 2>/dev/null","description":"Find git repos in frontend directory"},"permission_updates":[]}}

{"type":"permission_response","request_id":"perm-1770898513797-7se1xku","subtype":"success","response":{"updated_input":{"command":"ls -d /home/yspies/projects/frontend/pipelines 2>/dev/null && echo \"EXISTS\" || echo \"NOT_FOUND\"","description":"Check if pipelines dir exists"},"permission_updates":[]}}

{"type":"permission_response","request_id":"perm-1770898716347-lacadyv","subtype":"success","response":{"updated_input":{"command":"git -C /home/yspies/projects/frontend/pipelines log main..feature/WINS-13578_build-nl-spas --oneline 2>/dev/null || git -C /home/yspies/projects/frontend/pipelines log origin/main..feature/WINS-13578_build-nl-spas --oneline 2>/dev/null || git -C /home/yspies/projects/frontend/pipelines log master..feature/WINS-13578_build-nl-spas --oneline 2>/dev/null","description":"Show commits on the feature branch vs main"},"permission_updates":[]}}

{"type":"permission_response","request_id":"perm-1770898993532-17jdwkm","subtype":"success","response":{"updated_input":{"command":"git -C /home/yspies/projects/frontend/pipelines diff HEAD~1..HEAD 2>/dev/null","description":"Show the diff of the latest commit"},"permission_updates":[]}}
